summary: SSE Push Notifications feature verified. Backend SSE endpoints working correctly (10/10 tests pass). Frontend components load without errors. SSE status endpoint returns correct structure, merchant SSE endpoint properly authenticates tokens, and notification integration in process_merchant_payment is correctly configured.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ SSE router correctly registered at /api/notifications with tags=['Real-time Notifications']
✅ /api/notifications/sse/merchant endpoint validates JWT token with type='merchant' and merchant_id
✅ notify_merchant_payment function is imported and called in process_merchant_payment after successful payment
✅ PaymentNotificationToast component is lazy-loaded and correctly integrated in MerchantDashboard.jsx
✅ useSSENotifications hook connects to SSE service with token and handles connection state
✅ sseNotificationService singleton handles EventSource connection with reconnection logic
✅ All SSE-related frontend files pass lint checks without errors

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Components load without errors, no SSE-related JS errors

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - tests use JWT tokens created programmatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: SSE push notifications fully implemented. Backend: /api/notifications/sse/status (status check), /api/notifications/sse/merchant?token=JWT (SSE stream). Frontend: PaymentNotificationToast component in MerchantDashboard.jsx, useSSENotifications hook, sseNotificationService singleton. OneSignal error in console is unrelated - it's a separate push notification service restricted to production domain.

GET /api/notifications/sse/status.notes: Returns correct structure with connection counts

notes: Accepts valid merchant JWT and returns text/event-stream

features_verified: SSE merchant endpoint validates JWT tokens correctly
SSE endpoint returns text/event-stream content type
notify_merchant_payment function is imported in payments/processing.py
notify_merchant_payment is called after successful merchant payment
useSSENotifications hook handles SSE connection state
